# [Clang] Crash in `clang::CodeGen::CodeGenFunction::getEvaluationKind` when using parameter pack in inline asm

**Author:** Xniao
**URL:** https://github.com/llvm/llvm-project/issues/176147
**Status:** Open
**Labels:** clang:codegen, crash, inline-asm, generated by fuzzer

## Body

***Generated by fuzzer.***
Clang trunk crashed and goes back to 2.9.
Compiler Explorer: https://godbolt.org/z/ff6TbGPEx

## Program
```cpp
template <typename... Args> void large_arity_function(Args... args) {
  asm volatile("mov %%rax, %%rbx\n" : : "r"(args) : "rax");
}

int main() { large_arity_function(1); }
```
